title: bus.tengine.bridge_path_verified v1
description: Bridge path verification event for environment/silo terrain generation — fires after a heightmap sample is computed for a given silo and frame. Produced by the Tengine bridge subsystem. Distinct from bus.tengine.bridge.path_verified.v1 which uses dot-separated naming and a different data shape.

source.description: Lowercase source identifier for the environment.

frame.description: Frame number at which this verification was computed.

hm_sample.description: Heightmap sample value at the verified path point.

hm_sample_m.description: Heightmap sample value (metres scale) at the verified path point.
